subject: Urban watch: kangaroos and koalas positioning around Adelaide | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-1837
body: Here is a progress summary for the falcon plan in Adelaide. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Nikola Tesla is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-1837. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
